name: True Faith
text:
Unique.
Put this card on a non-infernal mortal ally you control, or burn 2 pool to put this card on a non-infernal minion you control. This minion cannot be the target of directed actions requiring Dominate [dom] or Presence [pre]. In combat, damage this minion inflicts on infernal minions is aggravated. Infernal minions cannot block or strike against this minion. Burn this card if this minion becomes infernal.
